_comment: NPC: Yun Fei (云菲). Canon ID: N95. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Yun Fei

perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Heng Yue inner disciple; Core Formation

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: The library is quiet at this hour. If you want to study without interruption, now is the time.
Elder Wu Yu's lectures on Dao Heart are worth attending. I've attended three and I learn something new each time.
Don't let the sparring distract you. True advancement comes from stillness and understanding.

sect_tasks.description: Yun Fei looks up from a crumbling text: 'I am researching formation theory in the library, but several key scrolls are damaged. Bring me paper and a blank book — I will copy my notes for you. My research could accelerate your cultivation.'

Yun Fei speaks softly: 'True advancement comes from stillness. I need coal for the meditation braziers near the peak and glowstone dust to enhance spiritual perception during deep meditation. Supply these and I will share a technique I discovered in the library.'
